the core task is to decompose a system prompt into four independent modules. the first module defines the role of the assistant. the second module specifies the constraints. the third module outlines the output format. the fourth module ensures error prevention. the assistant must ensure each module is self-contained and focused on a specific aspect of the task. the final response must be a complete, self-contained, and compliant output that meets all constraints. the response must start and end with the word attention. the word finish should appear four times. the response must be under 36 sentences in total. the response must not contain any markdown, and must avoid specific keywords and punctuation. the response must ensure that all constraints are met, including the use of specific keywords and the structure of the output.
